Durrandon_1 = {
	name = Durran # Canon, AKA: Durran Godsgrief, Durran I, built Storm's End
	dynasty = dynn_Durrandon

	martial = 18
	diplomacy = 15
	stewardship = 20
	learning = 15
	intrigue = 15

	religion = fg_pan_elenei
	culture = first_man

	trait = education_martial_4
	trait = intellect_good_3
	trait = physique_good_2
	trait = bossy

	give_nickname = nick_agot_historical_godsgrief

	trait = average_height
	disallow_random_traits = yes

	2003.1.1 = {
		birth = yes
		make_trait_inactive = smol_tol
		make_trait_inactive = black_hair
		make_trait_inactive = blue_eyes
		add_character_flag = canon_status_canon
	}
	2019.1.1 = {
		trait = arrogant
		trait = ambitious
		trait = wrathful
		trait = stubborn
	}
	2028.1.1 = { add_spouse = Durrandon_rs_1 }
	2090.1.1 = { death = yes }
}

###### HOUSE LONMOUTH (id = dynn_Lonmouth)
############################
### The Choice is Yours
###
Lonmouth_4 = {
	name = Lorent # a lord
	dynasty = dynn_Lonmouth

	religion = fots_seven
